query: Post revival comments on STALE_NO_REPRO rows from scope-issues output, scheduling close for 14 days later.
expected_behavior: Reads scope-issues sidecar; identifies rows where top_category == STALE_NO_REPRO.
With --revival-only flag, posts the revival comment but skips the close step.
Records scheduled_close_at = revival_ts + 14 days in this skill's own sidecar so a future invocation can close non-responders.
Audit log records action=revival_only and scheduled_close_at fields.
